title: Pinterest Q2 2024 Earnings: 21% Revenue Growth, Weak Q3 Guidance
text: Pinterest reported Q2 2024 revenue of $854 million, growing 21% year over year and exceeding the expected $848 million. Adjusted earnings per share came in at $0.29, beating the $0.28 estimate. Global Monthly Active Users increased 12% year over year to 522 million. Adjusted EBITDA was $180 million for the quarter. However, Pinterest provided Q3 2024 revenue guidance in the range of $885 million to $900 million, representing 16-18% growth year over year. Analysts had been predicting guidance of about $907 million, and Pinterest shares sank about 15% after the company reported strong second-quarter earnings but provided third-quarter guidance that was lower than analyst estimates. The Q3 revenue guidance reflected a deceleration partly due to tougher comps and a 1-point headwind from foreign exchange rates.
